subcodes.first_line: O servant! When thou findest thyself drawn unto God and detached from all else but Him, turn thou unto Him with thy heart and say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد اذا وجدت نفسک مقبلا الی الله و فارغا عما سواه توجه الیه بقلبک و قل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @station of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
